title: ASR Outdoor Extendable Fly Swatter Durable Telescopic Pole Anti Slip
description:
Keep those pesky insects in check with this Handheld Extending Bug Swatter! This highly portable lightweight inspect fly swatter is great for the home, office, park, camping, sporting events and more. Simply swing the racket in the direction of any insect, once the non-toxic plastic pad makes contact with the insect, it kills the bug with pure force. No more worrying about smelly candles or lights! Take matters into your own hands when it comes to bug defense! This pesky insect fly swatter features a non-toxic plastic square swatting pad. It is resilient and big enough to catch the pest. It is extendable up to 28.5" and collapsible down to 10.5" making it small enough to fit in a purse, tool box, tackle box, or to store in your car.

ASR Outdoor Extendable Fly Swatter Durable Telescopic Pole Anti Slip

Keep those pesky insects in check with this Handheld Extending Bug Swatter!

Key Features

  • Square Swatting Pad

  • Extendable Stainless Steel Pole
  • Anti-Slip Rubber Handle for a sturdy grip
  • Great for combating Mosquitoes. Flies, Gnats, Roaches and other pests

Product Specifications

  • UPC: 060886531753
  • Color: Assorted
  • Size: 10.5 in
